_meta.purpose: Per-modality structured report skeletons. The AI's job is to FILL this known structure with the radiologist's dictated findings, not invent a structure. Each template lists the ordered sections, the organ/region order within FINDINGS, and the standard 'normal' default line for each region. When the radiologist's input says a region is normal (or is silent on it and your workflow defaults to normal), use the provided normal_default line verbatim. Never auto-insert a normal line for a region the radiologist did not address unless your workflow explicitly opts in.
_meta.grounding: Structure follows RSNA RadReport conventions (Clinical history / Technique / Comparison / Findings / Impression) and standard organ-order conventions for each modality.
_meta.house_style: see radiology_lexicon.json -> spelling_style. Default here is US spelling. Switch the 'spelling' key to 'UK' to flip the whole pack.

XRAY_CHEST_PA.label: X-ray Chest PA view

normal_defaults.Lungs: Both lung fields are clear. No focal consolidation, mass, or cavitation.
normal_defaults.Heart and mediastinum: Cardiac size is within normal limits. Mediastinal contours are normal.
normal_defaults.Hila: Both hila are normal in size, density, and position.
normal_defaults.Bones (thoracic cage): The visualized bony thoracic cage is normal.
normal_defaults.Diaphragm and costophrenic angles: Both domes of the diaphragm are normal. Costophrenic angles are clear.

XRAY_CHEST_PA.normal_impression: No significant abnormality detected in the chest.

XRAY_KUB.label: X-ray KUB (plain abdomen)
XRAY_KUB.technique_default: Supine plain radiograph of the abdomen (KUB).

normal_defaults.Bowel gas pattern: Normal bowel gas pattern. No dilated bowel loops or air-fluid levels to suggest obstruction.
normal_defaults.Abnormal calcification / calculi: No abnormal calcification or radiopaque calculus seen along the renal or ureteric tract.
normal_defaults.Renal and psoas outlines: Renal and psoas outlines are preserved.

XRAY_KUB.normal_impression: No significant abnormality detected on the plain abdominal radiograph.

XRAY_SPINE.label: X-ray Spine (AP and lateral)
XRAY_SPINE.technique_default: AP and lateral views of the {{REGION}} spine.

normal_defaults.Alignment: Normal alignment and curvature. No listhesis.
normal_defaults.Vertebral bodies: Vertebral bodies are normal in height and density. No fracture or destructive lesion.

XRAY_SPINE.normal_impression: No significant abnormality detected in the {{REGION}} spine.

XRAY_BONE_JOINT.label: X-ray Bone / Joint
XRAY_BONE_JOINT.technique_default: AP and lateral views of the {{PART}}.

normal_defaults.Bones: No fracture, dislocation, or destructive bony lesion.
normal_defaults.Joint: Joint space is maintained. Articular surfaces are normal.

USG_ABDOMEN.label: USG Whole Abdomen
USG_ABDOMEN.technique_default: Real-time grey-scale ultrasonography of the abdomen was performed using a curvilinear transducer.

normal_defaults.Liver: Liver is normal in size and echotexture. No focal lesion. Intrahepatic biliary radicles are not dilated. Portal vein is normal.
normal_defaults.Gallbladder: Gallbladder is well distended with normal wall thickness. No calculus or sludge.
normal_defaults.Common bile duct: Common bile duct is normal in caliber.
normal_defaults.Pancreas: Pancreas is normal in size and echotexture. No focal lesion or ductal dilatation. (Note if obscured by bowel gas.)
normal_defaults.Spleen: Spleen is normal in size and echotexture. No focal lesion.
normal_defaults.Right kidney: Right kidney is normal in size, position, and echotexture with maintained corticomedullary differentiation. No calculus or hydronephrosis.
normal_defaults.Left kidney: Left kidney is normal in size, position, and echotexture with maintained corticomedullary differentiation. No calculus or hydronephrosis.
normal_defaults.Urinary bladder: Urinary bladder is partially distended with normal wall. No calculus or mass.
normal_defaults.Aorta and IVC: Abdominal aorta and IVC are normal in caliber.
normal_defaults.Free fluid: No free fluid in the abdomen.

USG_ABDOMEN.normal_impression: No significant abnormality detected on abdominal ultrasound.

USG_ABDOMEN_PELVIS_F.label: USG Abdomen and Pelvis (Female)
USG_ABDOMEN_PELVIS_F.technique_default: Real-time grey-scale ultrasonography of the abdomen and pelvis was performed.

normal_defaults.Liver: Liver is normal in size and echotexture. No focal lesion. IHBR not dilated.
normal_defaults.Gallbladder: Gallbladder is well distended. No calculus or sludge.
normal_defaults.Spleen: Spleen is normal in size and echotexture.
normal_defaults.Right kidney: Right kidney is normal. No calculus or hydronephrosis.
normal_defaults.Left kidney: Left kidney is normal. No calculus or hydronephrosis.
normal_defaults.Urinary bladder: Urinary bladder is normally distended with no mass or calculus.
normal_defaults.Uterus: Uterus is normal in size, shape, and echotexture. No focal myometrial lesion.
normal_defaults.Endometrium: Endometrial thickness is normal for the menstrual phase. Endometrial echo is central.
normal_defaults.Right ovary: Right ovary is normal in size and echotexture.
normal_defaults.Left ovary: Left ovary is normal in size and echotexture.
normal_defaults.Pouch of Douglas: No collection in the Pouch of Douglas.

USG_ABDOMEN_PELVIS_F.normal_impression: No significant abnormality detected on ultrasound of the abdomen and pelvis.

USG_OBSTETRIC.label: USG Obstetric
findings_order: Estimated fetal weight and gestational age

normal_defaults.Gestational sac / fetus: Single live intrauterine gestation in cephalic/variable presentation.
normal_defaults.Fetal cardiac activity: Fetal cardiac activity is present and regular. FHR is normal.
normal_defaults.Fetal biometry: BPD, HC, AC, and FL are recorded.
normal_defaults.Estimated fetal weight and gestational a: EFW and gestational age are recorded with the corresponding EDD.

USG_OBSTETRIC.normal_impression: Single live intrauterine gestation of {{GA}} weeks. Normal study for gestational age.

USG_KUB.label: USG KUB (Kidneys, Ureters, Bladder)
USG_KUB.technique_default: Real-time grey-scale ultrasonography of the kidneys, ureters, and bladder was performed.

normal_defaults.Right kidney: Right kidney is normal in size and echotexture. No calculus or hydronephrosis.
normal_defaults.Left kidney: Left kidney is normal in size and echotexture. No calculus or hydronephrosis.
normal_defaults.Urinary bladder: Urinary bladder is normally distended with normal wall. No calculus or mass.
normal_defaults.Prostate (if male): Prostate is normal in size and echotexture.

USG_KUB.normal_impression: No significant abnormality detected in the KUB region.

USG_THYROID.label: USG Thyroid / Neck
USG_THYROID.technique_default: High-resolution ultrasonography of the thyroid and neck was performed using a linear transducer.

normal_defaults.Right lobe: Right lobe of the thyroid is normal in size and echotexture. No focal nodule.
normal_defaults.Left lobe: Left lobe of the thyroid is normal in size and echotexture. No focal nodule.
normal_defaults.Vascularity: Normal parenchymal vascularity on colour Doppler.
normal_defaults.Cervical lymph nodes: No significantly enlarged cervical lymph node.

USG_THYROID.normal_impression: Normal thyroid ultrasound. No focal lesion.

CT_BRAIN_PLAIN.label: CT Brain (plain / non-contrast)
CT_BRAIN_PLAIN.technique_default: Axial non-contrast CT sections of the brain were obtained from the skull base to the vertex.

normal_defaults.Brain parenchyma: Normal attenuation of the cerebral and cerebellar parenchyma. No focal area of altered attenuation, infarct, or hemorrhage.
normal_defaults.Ventricular system: Ventricular system is normal in size and configuration.
normal_defaults.Midline / mass effect: Midline structures are central. No mass effect.
normal_defaults.Bones (skull): Visualized calvarium and skull base are normal. No fracture.
normal_defaults.Paranasal sinuses and mastoids: Visualized paranasal sinuses and mastoid air cells are clear.

CT_BRAIN_PLAIN.normal_impression: No significant abnormality detected on plain CT of the brain.

CT_ABDOMEN.label: CT Abdomen and Pelvis
CT_ABDOMEN.technique_default: Axial CT sections of the abdomen and pelvis were obtained {{WITH_OR_WITHOUT}} intravenous contrast.

normal_defaults.Liver: Liver is normal in size and attenuation. No focal lesion. No intrahepatic biliary dilatation.
normal_defaults.Gallbladder and biliary tree: Gallbladder is normal. No calculus. Biliary tree is not dilated.
normal_defaults.Pancreas: Pancreas is normal in size and attenuation. No focal lesion or ductal dilatation.
normal_defaults.Spleen: Spleen is normal in size and attenuation. No focal lesion.
normal_defaults.Kidneys and ureters: Both kidneys are normal in size, position, and enhancement. No calculus or hydronephrosis.
normal_defaults.Bowel: Visualized bowel loops are normal in caliber and wall thickness.
normal_defaults.Peritoneum / free fluid: No free fluid or free air.
normal_defaults.Lymph nodes: No significantly enlarged abdominal or pelvic lymph node.
normal_defaults.Vessels: Abdominal aorta and major vessels are normal.

CT_ABDOMEN.normal_impression: No significant abnormality detected on CT of the abdomen and pelvis.

CT_CHEST.label: CT Chest / Thorax
CT_CHEST.technique_default: Axial CT sections of the thorax were obtained {{WITH_OR_WITHOUT}} intravenous contrast.

normal_defaults.Lung parenchyma: Both lungs are normally expanded and clear. No focal consolidation, nodule, or mass.
normal_defaults.Airways: Trachea and major bronchi are normal.
normal_defaults.Heart and pericardium: Heart size is normal. No pericardial effusion.
normal_defaults.Chest wall and bones: Chest wall and visualized bones are normal.

CT_CHEST.normal_impression: No significant abnormality detected on CT of the thorax.

MRI_BRAIN_PLAIN.label: MRI Brain (plain)
MRI_BRAIN_PLAIN.technique_default: Multiplanar, multisequence MRI of the brain was performed (T1W, T2W, FLAIR, DWI, and GRE sequences).

normal_defaults.Brain parenchyma: Normal signal intensity of the cerebral and cerebellar parenchyma on all sequences. No focal signal abnormality, restricted diffusion, or abnormal enhancement.
normal_defaults.Ventricular system: Ventricular system is normal in size and configuration.
normal_defaults.Posterior fossa and brainstem: Posterior fossa, brainstem, and cerebellum are normal.
normal_defaults.Sella and parasellar region: Sella and parasellar region are normal.
normal_defaults.Vascular flow voids: Major intracranial vascular flow voids are preserved.
normal_defaults.Orbits, paranasal sinuses, mastoids: Visualized orbits, paranasal sinuses, and mastoids are normal.

MRI_BRAIN_PLAIN.normal_impression: No significant abnormality detected on MRI of the brain.

MRI_LUMBAR_SPINE.label: MRI Lumbar Spine
MRI_LUMBAR_SPINE.technique_default: Multiplanar T1W, T2W, and STIR sequences of the lumbosacral spine were obtained in sagittal and axial planes.

normal_defaults.Alignment: Normal lumbar lordosis and vertebral alignment. No listhesis.
normal_defaults.Vertebral bodies and marrow: Vertebral bodies are normal in height and marrow signal. No collapse or marrow lesion.
normal_defaults.Intervertebral discs (level-wise): Intervertebral discs show normal height and signal. No disc bulge, protrusion, or herniation at any level.
normal_defaults.Spinal cord and conus: Visualized spinal cord and conus medullaris are normal in signal. Conus terminates at the normal level.
normal_defaults.Thecal sac and canal: Thecal sac and spinal canal are normal in caliber. No canal stenosis.
normal_defaults.Neural foramina: Neural foramina are normal bilaterally. No nerve root compression.
normal_defaults.Posterior elements / facet joints: Facet joints and posterior elements are normal.

MRI_LUMBAR_SPINE.normal_impression: No significant abnormality detected on MRI of the lumbosacral spine.

MRI_KNEE.label: MRI Knee
MRI_KNEE.technique_default: Multiplanar, multisequence MRI of the knee was performed (PD, T1W, T2W, and fat-saturated sequences).

normal_defaults.Medial meniscus: Medial meniscus is normal in morphology and signal. No tear.
normal_defaults.Lateral meniscus: Lateral meniscus is normal in morphology and signal. No tear.
normal_defaults.Extensor mechanism: Quadriceps and patellar tendons are intact.

MRI_KNEE.normal_impression: No significant abnormality detected on MRI of the knee.
